name: CABALL
short_description: Veronica doesn't believe in mysticism, but the unexplained events that occur after she loses her job will make her change her mind forever.
detailed_description:
Veronica does not believe in mysticism. But as fate would have it, she is engaged in writing texts and commentary for Snezhana, the local fortune-teller.

One morning Veronica realizes that the fortune-teller is holding back her salary, so she decides to deal with the situation personally. However, Veronica doesn't come across her employer or the promised pay. She meets Lynn and Amalia instead, who have some sort of a relationship with the fortune-teller. As for Snezhana, she has already skipped town, leaving each of them a strange letter with her orders.

Veronica now has to make sense of the whole situation and face things she never believed in.

Features:

  • A branching plot where every choice affects the ending
  • Seven finals
  • Original soundtrack
  • Mystical atmosphere
  • Over 40,000 words
